name: Bella Wants Blood
short_description: Entertain the god-like Bella’s thirst for blood in this absurd bite-sized roguelike terror defense game.
detailed_description:
Bella wants to play! You play with Bella!

Trapping you in their world, the god-like Bella demands you play their game to feed them blood. Lay down gutters and destructive terrors to obliterate Bella’s friends and their grotesque minions. Just don’t let them reach the end of your maze or Bella will get upset. And if Bella gets upset, Bella might just keep you there forever.

Tasty strategies!

Choose your path to pick specific rewards and which monstrosities to face. Decide whether you want to seek out gutters, terrors, or powerful mementos to upgrade your abilities. Each journey is different, you’ll never play the same game twice.

Delicious choices!

Monstrosities spawn that end of the line of gutters you lay down. Do you want to build a winding length of gutters with carefully placed terrors, or a short terror barrage gauntlet?

Yummy treats!

Unlock powerful new monstrosities, terrors, and mementos as you defeat Bella’s monstrous friends.

Make the most of what you get to survive Bella’s game and maybe they’ll let you go. Maybe.

supported_languages:
English*, German, French, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
